title: BUG #19071: commit b448f1c8d broke LEFT JOIN pushdown
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS a (c1 integer NOT NULL, c2 text, c3 boolean DEFAULT TRUE);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS b (c1 integer NOT NULL, c2 text, c3 date);
INSERT INTO a (c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'text_1', NULL), (2, 'text_2', TRUE), (3, 'text_3', FALSE);
SELECT * FROM a LEFT JOIN b ON a.c1 = b.c1 WHERE a.c1 = 1;
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN pushdown broken by commit b448f1c8d
